author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Honkai: Star Rail X Round1 USA Collaboration PV: "Up Next, Round 1" | Honkai: Star Rail
#HonkaiStarRail #SilverWolf #Blade #Kafka #Firefly

Before the tutorial mission begins, a genius hacker and an immortal swordsman make their move...at the arcade machines.

The Stellaron Hunters, Silver Wolf and Blade, arrive at Round1 USA on May 22, 2026!

▼Visit Round1 USA's official website for more details
https://www.round1usa.com/collab/honkaistarrail

#HSRXRound1 #StarRail
